content.text:
I'll help you with a warmup exercise! Since this appears to be an exploration and planning task, let me start by exploring the workspace to understand what we're working with.

Let me begin by examining the current directory structure:</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand the codebase structure and prepare for planning tasks.<tool_call>Bash∁by Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI for Claude.瑚正在进行热身练习，探索工作空间以了解代码库结构。</think><tool_call>Bash_command yapan: ls -la /workspace瑚checking workspace contents.</think><tool_call>Bash_command yapan: find /workspace -type f -name "*.json" | head -20瑚Looking for configuration files.</think><tool_call>Bash_command yapan: find /workspace -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.go" \) | head -30瑚Looking for source code files.</think>
